states.name: Mikaela
states.title: Valentine's Day Angel
states.description:
Mikaela smiles to herself, as she watches Jeanne clumsily but earnestly try her hand at making chocolates. The Holy Maiden, carrying a fate so profound, with such strength in her heart—And yet, right now she is just a girl in love, her darling little sister.
"I don't know, Mikaela, what do you think...?"
"Alright, here comes the expert! Let's see..."
